ASR Outdoor Assorted Colors Paracord Bracelet Making Kit Matching Buckles 10pc

An essential survival and everyday carry item, the ASR Outdoor 10' Assorted Solid Colors Paracord Bracelet Making Kit with Matching Buckles includes assorted solid colors of paracord rope in 10-foot lengths with matching colored buckles. The paracord itself features a 550 lbs pull capacity, a seven strand cord construction and can be used for everything from making survival bracelets and necklaces, to fishing stringers, repairs, emergency slings, and impromptu dog leashes to name just a few! Hiking, trekking, camping, skiing, backpacking—whatever outdoor adventure activities you’re into, this 550 paracord bracelet making kit is handy to have for a multitude of different purposes outside of just making survival bracelets:

Key Features

  • PARACORD BRACELET KIT: An essential survival and everyday carry item, this paracord bracelet kit is a 10 piece set that includes assorted solid colors of paracord rope in ten foot lengths and matching colored buckles; the paracord itself features a 550 lbs pull capacity and a seven strand cord construction
  • SURVIVAL ESSENTIAL: Hiking, trekking, backpacking, skiing or camping, a paracord bracelet is an essential part of your survival kit, camping gear or bug out bag; it can assist with a multitude of tasks like hanging material, a fishing line or fishing stringer, a sling, an emergency tourniquet, help to make repairs, function as a pulley and so much more
  • MULTI PURPOSE: This 550 paracord, aside from being used a paracord bracelet making kit, can also be used for making necklaces, lanyards, keychains, paracord handles, shoe laces, hiking boot laces, water bottle handle, dog collars or dog leashes to name just a few; it’s generally great to keep lose paracord handy on your boat, kayak, car, truck, tow, pull, lift, garage, workshop, tool box and backpack for unforeseen mishaps or repairs
  • FUN CHILDRENS ACTIVITY: If you’re taking the family camping or leading a children's camp or outdoor school, this paracord bracelet making kit is a fun activity for young kids; the paracord kit is also great for girl and boy scout troops, schools and survival or camping clubs or groups
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Material: seven strand paracord; Product dimensions: 1 inch; Paracord length: 10 feet; Colors: solid assorted; Buckles: 10 units

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROPBK10PCSOL
  • UPC: 855569001926
  • Color: Multicolor
  • Size: 10 ft

-Hang clothes -Repair broken equipment -Emergency sling -Dog collar or dog leash -Emergency tourniquet -Water bottle handle -Fishing stringer or fishing line -Keychains and lanyards -Athletic shoe or hiking boot laces -Function as a pulley -Secure emergency shelter

Given its multi-functional nature, keep a bundle of this paracord in your boat, kayak, car, truck, tow, pull, lift, garage, workshop and toolbox for unforeseen mishaps or repairs; it’s an essential item to have in your backpack, survival bag, camping gear, emergency preparedness kit or bug out bag.
